name: Atara Biotherapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Overview Atara Biotherapeutics is a leader in T-cell immunotherapy, leveraging its novel allogeneic Epstein-Barr virus (EBV) T-cell platform to develop transformative therapies for patients with cancer and autoimmune disease. Tab-cel (tabelecleucel), has received marketing authorization approval under the proprietary name Ebvallo by the European Commission (EC) for commercial sale and use in the European Economic Area (EEA), by the Medicines and Healthcare products Regul...
